author: Anant Goel
name: Novel Eval-Time Adaptation + Meta-TTT + Tokenizer
blurb: Non-record research: (1) MAML Meta-TTT negative result (-0.085 BPB, too aggressive), (2) eval-time cache+OGD stacking gives -0.004 additive on TTT, (3) tokenizer optimization null result (-5.7% tokens/byte but no BPB gain).
novel_contributions: MAML-style Meta-TTT (negative result: -0.085 BPB, hyperparams too aggressive)
Eval-time cache mixture + OGD vocab bias stacking (-0.004 BPB additive on TTT)
Tokenizer optimization (null result: -5.7% tokens/byte, no BPB gain)
